description: Auth scaffolding (preparation only) - AuthProvider context with mock state, AuthGuard component, and documentation. NOT wired into dashboard layout to keep demo accessible.
steps: Create frontend/lib/auth-context.tsx following the same pattern as theme-context.tsx: (1) AuthProvider that stores user state (null = not logged in, object = logged in with {name, email, role}), (2) login() function that sets mock user {name: 'Demo User', email: 'demo@geoumkm.id', role: 'admin'}, (3) logout() function that clears user to null, (4) isAuthenticated boolean derived from user !== null, (5) Ready for real Azure AD B2C when NEXT_PUBLIC_AZURE_AD_B2C_CLIENT_ID is set and not 'placeholder' (add a TODO comment noting where to initialize MSAL), (6) useAuth() hook export

Create frontend/components/ui/AuthGuard.tsx: (1) A wrapper component that uses useAuth(), (2) If not authenticated, shows a card with 'Please log in to access this section' message and a 'Login' button that calls auth.login() (mock), (3) If authenticated, renders children, (4) Add a comment explaining that when real B2C is configured this will redirect to the B2C login page instead

Add a comment block in frontend/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx (at the top of the component, before the return) explaining where to add <AuthGuard> wrapper when ready for production auth: '// TODO: Wrap with <AuthGuard> when Azure AD B2C is configured. Currently disabled for demo access.'

Update docs/MANUAL_SETUP_NOTES.md to add section (M) Azure AD B2C Authentication Setup with: (1) Steps to create B2C tenant, (2) App registration steps, (3) User flow creation, (4) Environment variables needed (NEXT_PUBLIC_AZURE_AD_B2C_TENANT_NAME, NEXT_PUBLIC_AZURE_AD_B2C_CLIENT_ID, NEXT_PUBLIC_AZURE_AD_B2C_POLICY_NAME), (5) Note about enabling AuthGuard in dashboard layout
acceptance_criteria: frontend/lib/auth-context.tsx exports AuthProvider and useAuth hook
frontend/components/ui/AuthGuard.tsx renders children when authenticated, shows login prompt when not
Dashboard remains fully accessible without authentication (AuthGuard is NOT wrapping the layout)
Comment in dashboard layout clearly indicates where to enable auth
pnpm build succeeds with no errors
pnpm test:ci still passes all existing tests
findings: All existing 32 tests pass. Build generates all 18 static pages. No new dependencies required for mock auth.
